lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: Description:
  UnstoppableMango's Type Description Language CLI

Usage:
  um [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  broker                         Manage the tdl broker
  gen, generate <source> <file>  Generate types for the target format
  from <source> <file>           Convert the source format to uml
